title: Crisp Compact Middle Eastern Bok Choi Pilaf
description: A funky and dense Middle Eastern dish featuring bok choi and dashi extract, perfect for a quick fix, and macrobiotic friendly. It combines the flavors of the Middle East with the nutrition of bok choi.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped bok choi and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add the dashi extract, sumac, and salt, and stir to combine.
Add the basmati rice to the skillet, stirring to combine with the bok choi mixture.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the rice is heated through and starting to crisp.
Serve hot, garnished with additional sumac if desired.
